cards.front: Name three HTML tags from the specification.
Which object-oriented language/environment is named in the specification?
Name three Greenfoot skills from the specification.
cards.back: Examples include creating classes, writing methods, using keyboard input, playing sounds and collision detection.

cards.front: Name three assembly mnemonics from the specification.
cards.back: Examples include INP, OUT, STA, LDA, ADD, SUB, BRA, HLT and DAT.

cards.front: What is a markup language used for here?
cards.back: To design and write HTML web pages.
